/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/llm_serving_cache.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llm_serving_cache.dir/src/metadata_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llm_serving_cache.dir/src/node_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llm_serving_cache.dir/src/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llm_serving_cache.dir/src/placement_policy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llm_serving_cache.dir/src/coordinator.cpp.o -o llm_serving_cache  third_party/veristore/libkv_store.a
